heading: Implementation of education, hospital and health facility, etc., contracts and grants by Public Health Service personnel; request for detail of personnel
label: 2004b Implementation of education, hospital and health facility, etc., contracts and grants by Public Health Service personnel; request for detail of personnel
text: In accordance with subsection (d) of , upon the request of any Indian tribe, band, group, or community, commissioned officers of the Service may be assigned by the Secretary for the purpose of assisting such Indian tribe, group, band, or community in carrying out the provisions of contracts with, or grants to, tribal organizations pursuant to sections 5321 and 5322 of title 25.section 215 of this title
notes: Amendments1988—, which directed amendment of this section by substituting reference to sections 5321 and 5322 of title 25 for reference to section 5321, former section 450g, “and” , was executed by making the substitution for reference to section 5321, former section 450g, “or” , to reflect the probable intent of Congress.Pub. L. 100–472section 5322 of title 25section 5322 of title 25
